schedules.name: System Heartbeat
schedules._desc: Provides a visual heartbeat on the built-in Heltec orange LED every 2 seconds.

schedules.name: Mains Control
schedules._desc: Simulated hourly toggle for a heavy 110V load. Disabled by default for safety.

schedules.name: Water Solenoid
schedules._desc: Pulses Relay 2 for 10 seconds every 4 hours. Ideal for automated irrigation.

schedules.name: Accent Light
schedules._desc: Sets a 25% duty cycle (64/255) on IO26 every minute.

schedules.name: Sensor Power
schedules._desc: Toggles external power rail to cycle sensors every 5 minutes.

schedules.name: GPS KeepAlive
schedules._desc: Brief 500ms pulse on GPS TX pin for wake-up synchronization.

schedules.name: Aux Pulse 2
schedules._desc: 2-second pulse on auxiliary IO34 every minute.
